center.name: 威拉省
center.summary: 威拉省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括纽氏梅花雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Glaucestrilda thomensis |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22719528A263821120 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22719528A263821120.en |access-date=1 November 2025}} | genus = Glaucestrilda | species = thomensis | authority = (Sousa, 1888) | synonyms = Estrilda thomensis }} The Cinderella waxbill (Glaucestrilda thomensis) is a near-threatened species of estrildid finch found in drier regions of southwestern Angola around the Namibe Province, north and east to the southwest of the Huíla Province and north to Fazenda do Cuito in Huambo, and also in the extreme northwestern part of Namibia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Glaucestrilda thomensis |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22719528A263821120 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22719528A263821120.en |access-date=1 November 2025}} | genus = Glaucestrilda | species = thomensis | authority = (Sousa, 1888) | synonyms = Estrilda thomensis }} The Cinderella waxbill (Glaucestrilda thomensis) is a near-threatened species of estrildid finch found in drier regions of southwestern Angola around the Namibe Province, north and east to the southwest of the Huíla Province and north to Fazenda do Cuito in Huambo, and also in the extreme northwestern part of Namibia
